evidence: dotnet test Hx.Cycle.Tests = 67 passed (incl. new ChangeSetIdentity exclusion unit test proving an owned doc is subtracted from the identity but a code path is not). dotnet test Hx.Runner.Tests = 228 passed, 0 failed. New integration test StagingTheDriftReviewReport_DoesNotStaleImplement_AtTheReleaseCheck reproduces the exact failure (drift-review report staged at the release Check) and asserts implement:fresh (it read implement:stale before the fix); StagingAnUnownedFileStillStalesImplement asserts a real post-implement code edit still yields implement:stale (exclusion is exact); 226 existing cycle-enforcement tests unchanged (no regression).
